name: Research Desk returns a synthesis grounded in listed sources
description: The user asks a research question; the system returns a synthesized analysis plus a sources list, where the sources relate to the question topic and the answer is grounded rather than empty.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Research Desk link in the sidebar
Type the question 'What is spaced repetition in learning?' into the research input field
Verify that after loading completes a research analysis area shows multi-sentence answer text on the topic of memory or spaced repetition, displayed alongside a distinct Sources list

Verify the Sources list contains at least one source entry with a title and a link/URL, and the source topic is plausibly related to the question — confirming the answer is grounded in retrieved sources rather than an empty or sourceless response
